#  Move Specifications to Another Specification Area 
##  Background 
If your project uses [specification areas](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-specification-areas), you might run into a scenario where specifications need to be moved from one specification area to another. Instead of deleting and re-uploading the specifications, you can bulk edit to move them to another area.
Things to Consider
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Mark the checkboxes next to the specifications you want to move.
  3. Click **Edit.**
  4. Mark the checkbox next to **Specification** **Area**.
  5. Choose whether you want to move the specifications to an existing area or create a new one:
     * **To move specifications** **to an existing specification area** :
       1. Begin typing the name of the specification area, or double click into the field to view a list of existing specification areas.
       2. Select the specification area from the drop-down menu.
     * **To move specifications to a new specification area** :
       1. Enter a name for the new specification area in the 'Specification Area' field.  
_Note:_ The specification area name must be less than 255 characters, and the name cannot already exist in the project.
  6. Click **Update**. 
#####  Note
     * A banner appears at the top of the page confirming that the specifications were moved.  
OR  
If one or more specifications have the same specification number as a specification in the existing area, you are prompted to confirm the specifications on the review page.
     * Email notifications are sent in the following scenarios:
       * If more than 50 specifications are being moved at one time, you will receive an email when the specification move is complete.
       * If specifications were unable to be moved, you will receive an email with one or more error messages.
     * Specifications will be in the 'Unpublished' state after being moved to a new area. To upload specifications, see [Upload Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/upload-specifications).
     * Specification hyperlinks may take some time to appear after the specifications have been confirmed.
     * A Bulk Edit transfer in progress prevents the deletion of an empty Specification Area.


## See Also

  * [What are Procore Zones?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-procore-zones)

title: Move Specifications to Another Specification Area
description: How to move one specification area to another area by using bulk edit.
